name: Sweet Onion Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 9x5x3 loaf pan.
3. In a sauté pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
4. When the oil is hot, caramelize the onions for about 10 minutes until translucent and caramelized.
5. In an electric mixer with a whip attachment, whip the egg whites on high speed until stiff peaks form.
6. Switch the whip attachment to a paddle attachment and cream the butter and sugar together in the mixer until light and fluffy.
7. Add the egg yolks one at a time, beating well after each yolk. Mix in the apple juice and ginger with the mixture.
8. In a separate bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, salt, and pepper; mix until combined.
9. With the mixer on low speed, alternate adding the flour (about 1/3 cup at a time) with the milk. Do not overmix the batter.
10. Fold in the stiff egg whites to the batter gently.
11. Pour the batter into the prepared loaf pan and smooth the top with a spatula.
12. Bake for 50-60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
13. Remove the pan from the oven and invert the bread onto a wire rack. Allow to cool completely before slicing.
14. Slice the bread and place it on a plate.
